label: Party View
description: Screenshot-era whole graph view built only from character sheet data.
editing_notes: This is the target renderer for docs/screenshots/Structured_Knowledge_Graph_Full.png.
Use character-sheet data only; exclude place and session-note lore even when those files exist in the active lore directory.
Override only values that should differ from config/graphviz/global_graph_view.json.
After changing spacing or routing, regenerate docs/screenshots/Structured_Knowledge_Graph_Full.png and run the simplified graph label-position UI regression.
